content.text: for v3.3: UI effort is now green, waiting on feedback from MaaS backend team
ODH operator is now able to deploy MaaS. Some issues had been identified and are already being fixed.
Platform team is assisting on final tasks to move the integration to RHOAI.

We have found that we cannot properly test MaaS in a disconnected environment until the downstreaming of the operator integration is finished. We may step back for claiming support in disconnected envs.
Testing of MaaS in on-prem clusters started this week. This may be considered a stretch goal.
For RHOAI 3.3 we had stepped back on the support for user-defined Gateways.
Some data validations of Tiers are work in progress, on track for code freeze.
The remaining work item was merged.
UI for MaaS Tiers & API Keys -
UI for MaaS Tiers is finished – signoffs and testing is still going on due to some cluster issues
API Keys did not make it with the final push for everything
Onboarding of MaaS micro front-end to RHOAI -
